Journal.Title: Zhonghua xin xue guan bing za zhi
Journal.ISOAbbreviation: Zhonghua Xin Xue Guan Bing Za Zhi

Article.ArticleTitle: [Screening and identification of vascular calcification-associated genes: implication of thymidine kinase 1].

Abstract.AbstractText: Objective: Investigate key genes influencing vascular calcification through bioinformatics analysis and experimental validation. Methods: Three vascular calcification datasets (GSE159832, GSE229679 and GSE37558) were obtained from the Gene Expression Omnibus database. Subsequently, gene ontology (GO), Kyoto encyclopedia of genes and genomes (KEGG), and conventional gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA) were performed on the common differential expressed genes(DEGs). For in vitro validation, a vascular smooth muscle cell calcification model was established by stimulating mouse primary vascular smooth muscle cells with high phosphate and calcium chloride (Pi+CaCl2). Cells were divided into a control group and a Pi+CaCl2 group. To investigate the role of TK1, cells were transfected with TK1-targeting siRNA (siTK1) or control siRNA (siControl) prior to Pi+CaCl2 stimulation, creating siControl+Pi+CaCl2 and siTK1+Pi+CaCl2 groups. The association between key DEGs and vascular calcification was assessed at the protein and mRNA levels using Western blot and quantitative real-time PCR, respectively. Changes in the phosphorylation of the downstream effector, AKT (p-AKT/AKT), were also measured. Results: A total of 2275, 449, and 381 DEGs were identified from the three vascular calcification datasets (GSE159832, GSE229679, and GSE37558), respectively. Two common DEGs-phosphoserine aminotransferase 1 and thymidine kinase 1 (TK1)-were identified across all datasets. GO enrichment analysis revealed that TK1 was significantly enriched in pathways related to ribosome biogenesis, assembly, and rRNA processing and maturation. GSEA-KEGG analysis indicated significant enrichment in the PI3K-AKT signaling pathway, pathways in cancer, neurodegenerative diseases, cytoskeleton, and smooth muscle contraction. Conventional GSEA of TK1 further confirmed significant enrichment in pathways including dynein, epithelial tight junctions, axon guidance, and vascular smooth muscle contraction pathways. At the experimental level, both protein and mRNA expression of TK1, along with the p-AKT/AKT ratio, were significantly lower in the Pi+CaCl2 group compared to the control group (all P<0.05). Furthermore, compared to the siControl+Pi+CaCl2 group, the siTK1+Pi+CaCl2 group exhibited decreased expression of differentiation markers, increased expression of calcification markers, and a further reduced p-AKT/AKT ratio (all P<0.05). Conclusion: Integrated bioinformatics and cellular validation demonstrate a correlation between TK1 expression and vascular calcification, suggesting a potential protective role for TK1 in this pathological process.

MedlineJournalInfo.MedlineTA: Zhonghua Xin Xue Guan Bing Za Zhi

OtherAbstract.AbstractText: 目的： 基于生物信息学方法及实验验证探讨影响血管钙化的关键基因。 方法： 收集来源于基因表达综合数据库的3个血管钙化数据集（GSE159832、GSE229679、GSE37558），筛查差异表达基因并取交集，基于共同差异表达基因进行单基因GO、KEGG、常规基因集富集分析。在细胞水平采用高磷酸盐和氯化钙（Pi+CaCl2）刺激小鼠原代血管平滑肌细胞建立血管平滑肌细胞钙化模型，分为对照组和Pi+CaCl2组；敲低TK1基因并给予Pi+CaCl2刺激，分为siControl+Pi+CaCl2组和siTK1+Pi+CaCl2组。采用Western blot和实时荧光定量聚合酶链式反应在蛋白和mRNA水平验证关键差异基因与血管钙化的相关性，同时检测其下游通路磷酸化AKT鼠科胸腺瘤病毒癌基因同源物/AKT鼠科胸腺瘤病毒癌基因同源物（p-AKT/AKT）的变化。 结果： 通过3个血管钙化数据集分别筛选出2 275、449和381个差异表达基因，3个数据集取交集后得到2个共同差异表达基因，为磷酸丝氨酸氨基转移酶1和胸苷激酶1（TK1）。GO富集分析显示，TK1显著富集的通路包括核糖体的生物发生、组装以及rRNA的加工和成熟过程；KEGG分析显示，TK1显著富集的通路包括磷脂酰肌醇3-激酶-蛋白激酶B信号通路、癌症、神经退行性疾病、细胞骨架和平滑肌收缩相关通路。TK1单基因常规基因集富集分析显示，TK1显著富集的通路包括动力蛋白、上皮细胞紧密连接、轴突引导及血管平滑肌收缩相关通路。Western blot及实时荧光定量聚合酶链式反应结果显示，Pi+CaCl2组的小鼠原代血管平滑肌细胞中TK1的蛋白和mRNA表达水平低于对照组，其下游通路p-AKT/AKT比值也下降（P均<0.05）。与siControl+Pi+CaCl2组相比，siTK1+Pi+CaCl2组分化指标的蛋白和mRNA表达降低，钙化指标表达增加，p-AKT/AKT比值下降（P均<0.05）。 结论： 生物信息学分析及细胞学验证显示TK1表达与血管钙化存在相关性，并对血管钙化可能存在保护作用。.
